en: Hi dad. Do you know what overwhelming means?
Overwhelming means, very great in amount.
It also means confusing or difficult to fight against.
Oh, I see. I have too much homework to do, I find it overwhelming. Can I use like this?
Exactly. When you have too much homework to do, you have an overwhelming amount of work.
It means, the homework is too much, I find it difficult to do, right?
Yes. Also, when you are feeling a strong amount of sadness, this is an example of overwhelming sadness.
Oh, it means that I don't know what to do, I am overwhelmed by sadness, right?
